chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1397 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5600/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 08.09.2025 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Addl. AG places on record order dated 25.11.2024 along with a statement, which is taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the Petitioner, who after going through the same, does not press this Petition and submits that Petitioner will avail his alternate remedy provided under the law. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
